name: Shinbi

notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias

coachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime and extended fights: first spike lands around minute 12 (Noxia), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +20.9% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

augments.name: Crescendo
augments.note: chain-final basic bonus; chain length is unstated in our data

offMeta.honestAbsence: no defensible off-meta option this patch (no underexplored item clears the 8% objective edge vs the popular build)

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for 10s rotation damage, online around minute 25 — about 1,904 damage over a 10s rotation in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +71% more 10s rotation damage: try Noxia over Orb Of Growth (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for 10s rotation damage, online around minute 25 — about 1,809 damage over a 10s rotation in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +80% more 10s rotation damage: try Noxia over Orb Of Growth (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for extended fights vs bruisers, online around minute 25 — about 3,399 damage over a 20s fight in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +42% more extended fights vs bruisers: try Noxia over Megacosm (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 41% of its bite; you give up 19% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 40% of its bite; you give up 20% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Even kill threat throughout: this lane is decided by mechanics and wave control, not scaling.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 31% of its bite; you give up 20% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your kill threat peaks early-to-mid: cash it in before their later items level the exchange.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 40% of its bite; you give up 20% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Respect their early kill threat; the exchange levels out later, so trade patiently and scale.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 31% of its bite; you give up 20% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Even kill threat throughout: this lane is decided by mechanics and wave control, not scaling.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 41% of its bite; you give up 19% of your damage.

flags: crests and consumables not yet in the build model; augments with tractable mechanics are simulated, the rest are listed unmodeled
